summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for ADS Gupta advertising platform. Verified bug fix from iteration_4 (mobile menu button visibility) and tested all required features. All 6 Hub cards link correctly. Section order matches expected narrative flow.

code_issues.issue: Had duplicate id='network' conflicting with NetworkSection. FIXED: Changed to id='stats'
Console warning: <span> inside <option> and <select> causes hydration issues. Minor HTML validation issue.

passed_tests: Navigation: Login and Try Demo buttons grouped on right side with vertical divider - VERIFIED
Mobile menu button visible and functional on mobile viewport (390x844) - BUG FIX VERIFIED
Mobile menu opens on click and shows all navigation items + Login/Try Demo buttons
Hub Section: All 6 cards present with correct links:
Homepage section order verified: Hero -> StatsTicker -> Features(Neural Engine) -> Hub -> MarketplaceSection -> BlogPreview -> NetworkSection -> Footer
NetworkSection positioned at bottom above Footer with title 'THE ADS GUPTA NETWORK'
Chatbot (Neural Oracle) button visible in bottom right corner
Chatbot opens on click and displays 'THE NEURAL ORACLE' title
critical_code_review_comments: ContactPage.jsx has <span> wrapper around <option> elements which causes React hydration warnings. Consider removing the wrapper.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration_4 bug fix verified. Mobile menu button now visible. All Hub card links work correctly. StatsTicker duplicate ID fixed. Minor HTML validation issue in ContactPage.jsx remains.

mocked_apis.note: Chatbot AI responses, Login functionality, Contact form submission, Newsletter signup are all MOCKED (UI only)
